description_long: This object is a collection of six distinct bungalow-style residential buildings, each with a low, horizontal profile and simple geometric forms. The bungalows feature a mix of gable and flat roofs, with some roofs rendered in brown or dark gray, and others in white or light gray. The buildings are set on rectangular bases, some of which have green patches suggesting lawns or yards. Windows and doors are visible on several facades, with some bungalows displaying symmetrical arrangements and others more asymmetrical. The overall design is modest and functional, typical of suburban neighborhoods, with each unit appearing to be single-story. The materials and color palette evoke a modern yet approachable residential aesthetic.
description: A group of six single-story bungalows with varied roof styles, neutral colors, and simple, modern residential features. Each building sits on a rectangular base, some with green lawns, and displays a mix of window arrangements.
description_view_0: The bungalows are seen from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the roofs and the green bases of some units, with the smallest building set apart from the main row.
description_view_1: A direct side view reveals the height and length of each bungalow, showing the diversity in roof shapes and the alignment of the buildings in a row.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the rear and side facades, with more detail on the window and door placements, and the separation of the smallest bungalow from the group.
description_view_3: The bungalows are viewed from the opposite side, displaying the front facades and entrances, with clear visibility of the different roof colors and the arrangement of the buildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical window placements
